zh.Moreton, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Davenport於1256年出生在英國爾切斯特時，他的父親Sir Roger Davenport31歲，母親Lady Mary Salemon28歲。他和Agnes de Macclesfield至少有1個女兒。他去世於1294年在英國爾莫雷頓享年38歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.Moreton, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾南特維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Davenport于1256年出生在英国爾切斯特时，他的父亲Sir Roger Davenport31岁，母亲Lady Mary Salemon28岁。他和Agnes de Macclesfield至少有1个女儿。他去世于1294年在英国爾莫雷頓享年38岁，埋葬在英国爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Davenport was born in 1256, in Chester, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Roger Davenport, was 31 and his mother, Lady Mary Salemon, was 28. He had at least 1 daughter with Agnes de Macclesfield. He died in 1294, in Moreton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Davenport est né en 1256, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Davenport, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Salemon, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Agnes de Macclesfield. Il est décédé en 1294, à Moreton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Davenport 1256 in Chester, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Davenport 31 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Salemon 28. Er hatte mit Agnes de Macclesfield mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1294 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Moreton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Davenport è nato il nel 1256 nel Chester, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Davenport, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Salemon, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Agnes de Macclesfield. Morì nel 1294, nel Moreton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Davenportが1256年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Davenportは31歳，母Lady Mary Salemonは28歳であった。彼はAgnes de Macclesfieldとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1294年にイギリスチェシュアイアモーエトンで38歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Davenport(이)가 1256년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Davenport(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Salemon(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Agnes de Macclesfield(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 영국 체실르 모레턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Moreton, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: Nantwich, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Davenport nasceu em 1256, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Davenport, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Salemon, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Agnes de Macclesfield. Ele faleceu em 1294, em Moreton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Davenport родился в 1256 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Davenport было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Salemon, 28. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Agnes de Macclesfield. Он умер в 1294 г. в местности моретон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Davenport nació en 1256, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Davenport, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Salemon, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Agnes de Macclesfield. Murió en 1294, en Moreton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
